title: Without a Stitch
writer: Annelise Meineche, John Hilbard, Jens Bjørneboe
actors: Anne Grete Nissen, Ib Mossin, Joan Gamst
plot: When a high-school girl complains of her inability to reach sexual climax, her doctor suggests that she keep a diary of her sexual encounters. She does just that and soon finds herself caught up in a sexual merry-go-round that inc...
